name: Peoplebox
tagline: AI-native OKR and performance management platform
description: Peoplebox is an AI-native platform that unifies OKRs, performance management, employee engagement, and 1:1s into a single workflow. Its AI features auto-generate performance reviews from check-in data, analyze engagement trends, create OKR suggestions, and provide real-time coaching nudges. Peoplebox integrates deeply with Slack and Teams to meet employees where they work.
